news_items.summary: Tip for shorter-than-average players: Don’t run into Basallo at home plate.

news_items.headline: Rangers righty Jacob deGrom reaches 1,900 strikeouts as 2nd-fastest by games and innings
news_items.summary: The 1,900th strikeout came in deGrom's 256th appearance, all as a starter. Hall of Famer Randy Johnson reached that mark in his 252nd game in 1997.

news_items.headline: Rangers 3, Cubs 0: Jameson Taillon was good, but Jacob deGrom was better
news_items.summary: And Daniel Palencia gave up his first runs of 2026.

news_items.headline: Carlos Rodon makes season debut, but Yankees swept by Brewers after walk-off home run
news_items.summary: The Yankees were swept by the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday afternoon after the Brewers walked them off for a second day in a row.

news_items.headline: Jacob Wilson injury update: Athletics shortstop suffers shoulder sprain
news_items.summary: Get the latest injury update on Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson after he suffered a left shoulder sprain on Sunday, May 10.

news_items.headline: Turang walk-off homer gives Brewers 4-3 victory, caps sweep of Yankees
news_items.summary: Another memorable Mother’s Day in Milwaukee

news_items.headline: Dodgers get boost with Betts' return set for Mon.
news_items.summary: Mookie Betts is set to return after missing more than a month because of a right oblique strain when the Dodgers open a four-game series vs. the Giants on Monday.

news_items.headline: Rangers' deGrom second fastest to 1,900 K's
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Jacob deGrom earned his 1,900th career strikeout in the first inning against the Cubs, becoming the second-fastest pitcher to that milestone by games and innings.

news_items.headline: Giants send struggling reliever Walker to minors
news_items.summary: The Giants sent struggling reliever Ryan Walker to Triple-A Sacramento following his fourth straight outing when he allowed at least one run.

news_items.headline: Red Sox 1B Contreras HBP on hand, leaves game
news_items.summary: The Red Sox said initial tests on Willson Contreras came back negative after he left Sunday's game against the Rays with a bruised right hand suffered when he was hit by a fastball from Tampa Bay's Nick Martinez.

news_items.headline: O's infield coach ejected after challenge denied
news_items.summary: Orioles infield coach Miguel Cairo was ejected in the third inning of Sunday's game against the Athletics after arguing over a challenge that wasn't granted.

news_items.headline: A's SS Wilson hurts shoulder diving for grounder
news_items.summary: Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson suffered a left shoulder sprain after he went diving to field a ground ball. He will undergo further tests on Monday.

news_items.headline: 'Legend': Players, coaches mourn Bobby Cox, 84
news_items.summary: MLB players and coaches remembered late manager Bobby Cox, who died at 84.

news_items.headline: ⚾ A May MLB trade!? Grading the deal
news_items.summary: Cleveland acquired an elite defensive catcher from San Francisco. Which side fared best in the surprising swap?

news_items.headline: Cubs Minor League Wrap: Carter Trice slams Knoxville past Barons, 7-2
news_items.summary: The Smokies’ late power surge kept the Cubs system from being shut down today.
